canonical_items.display_text: Independent, flexible exploration yields more authentic experiences than rigid tours.
canonical_items.evidence: Organized tour groups have never appealed to us, due to what we see as confining rigidity and structure.

variants.text: Independent, flexible exploration yields more authentic experiences than rigid tours.

canonical_items.display_text: Hands-on participation, even if small, is valuable in humanitarian response.
canonical_items.evidence: Relative to the magnitude of the ruin, the products of our labor were miniscule. However, we felt wonderful knowing that we were able to help, if only in a small way.

variants.text: Hands-on participation, even if small, is valuable in humanitarian response.

canonical_items.display_text: Minor setbacks do not derail long-term career momentum.
canonical_items.evidence: that minor blips do not sidetrack the momentum of a career trajectory.

variants.text: Minor setbacks do not derail long-term career momentum.

canonical_items.display_text: Observe others' grit and sacrifice as motivation to persist in your ambitions.
canonical_items.evidence: He talked about the constant pain, but how it was worth all of it for the glory of Major League baseball.

variants.text: Observe others' grit and sacrifice as motivation to persist in your ambitions.

canonical_items.display_text: Learning driven by intrinsic enjoyment sustains long-term practice.
canonical_items.evidence: It was just a labor of love that I found enjoyable.

variants.text: Learning driven by intrinsic enjoyment sustains long-term practice.

canonical_items.display_text: Do your own research when external advice is vague or inconsistent.
canonical_items.evidence: Not being satisfied with this guidance, I went to the Broward County library and did some research.

variants.text: Do your own research when external advice is vague or inconsistent.

canonical_items.display_text: Adopt an ethic of reciprocity—'pay it forward'—as a guiding motive for service.
canonical_items.evidence: Dot and I have adopted that as our essential creed throughout the years.

variants.text: Adopt an ethic of reciprocity—'pay it forward'—as a guiding motive for service.

canonical_items.display_text: Maintain consistent goal-setting to drive long-term personal improvement.
canonical_items.evidence: I went through this annual exercise consistently for twenty-five or thirty years.

variants.text: Maintain consistent goal-setting to drive long-term personal improvement.
Use retrospection in later life to clarify meaning and legacy.
Accept serendipity as a meaningful factor in life outcomes.
Treat major commitments with seriousness and intentionality.

canonical_items.display_text: Treat small losses or mistakes as lessons and adjust future behavior accordingly.
canonical_items.evidence: I resolved then and there to be more careful with my hard-earned money.

variants.text: Treat small losses or mistakes as lessons and adjust future behavior accordingly.

canonical_items.display_text: Move decisively and rapidly when leading a turnaround; bold, timely action can accelerate change.
canonical_items.evidence: I made bold moves, and I made them rapidly.

variants.text: Move decisively and rapidly when leading a turnaround; bold, timely action can accelerate change.
Move quickly and decisively once priorities are set.
Signal seriousness about strategic priorities by changing leadership when execution stalls.

canonical_items.display_text: Learn from financial mistakes and take corrective action.
canonical_items.evidence: I vowed then and there to never again find myself in such a position.

variants.text: Learn from financial mistakes and take corrective action.

canonical_items.display_text: Leaders must develop delegation skills rather than assuming excessive responsibility.
canonical_items.evidence: Throughout my later business career, I struggled from time to time with leadership and management issues —taking on too much of the responsibility myself and failing to distribute the workload.

variants.text: Leaders must develop delegation skills rather than assuming excessive responsibility.

canonical_items.display_text: Leaders should model the behaviors they expect from others.
canonical_items.evidence: He wore the uniform, talked the talk and walked the walk of the Boy Scouts of America.

variants.text: Leaders should model the behaviors they expect from others.
Use structured milestones and visible recognition to motivate progress and learning.

canonical_items.display_text: Teach practical skills through hands-on instruction and close supervision to build competence.
canonical_items.evidence: She taught me how to match colors and regularly sent me uptown to the Ben Franklin store with fabric samples to buy matching spools of thread.

variants.text: Teach practical skills through hands-on instruction and close supervision to build competence.
Hands-on tasks create skill, pride, and quality workmanship.

canonical_items.display_text: Judge founders and leaders by intelligence, energy and integrity.
canonical_items.evidence: intelligence, energy and integrity

variants.text: Judge founders and leaders by intelligence, energy and integrity.

canonical_items.display_text: Mitigate operational risk by hiring expertise and acquiring skills when entering a new domain.
canonical_items.evidence: I hired a captain to assist me in bringing it three hundred miles down the Intracoastal Waterway.

variants.text: Mitigate operational risk by hiring expertise and acquiring skills when entering a new domain.

canonical_items.display_text: Practice gratitude and acknowledge others' contributions.
canonical_items.evidence: If there is a theme in this chronology, it’s one of gratitude.

variants.text: Practice gratitude and acknowledge others' contributions.
Cultivate and value mentorship and tutelage.

canonical_items.display_text: Repair damaged supplier relationships through direct, face-to-face negotiation in neutral settings.
canonical_items.evidence: I insisted that it be a one-on-one meeting and that it be held at a location other than the GM headquarters.

variants.text: Repair damaged supplier relationships through direct, face-to-face negotiation in neutral settings.

canonical_items.display_text: Acknowledge and be grateful for institutional development and mentorship.
canonical_items.evidence: I am honored and will be forever grateful for the generous experience provided by the firm.

variants.text: Acknowledge and be grateful for institutional development and mentorship.

canonical_items.display_text: Find and acknowledge beauty in mundane settings.
canonical_items.evidence: in the midst of all this monotony and noise, there were occasional bursts of beauty.

variants.text: Find and acknowledge beauty in mundane settings.
